  143.  case class AccessPointPlace(name: Option[String] = None, waypoint: Option[Int] = None, type: String, location: Location, originalLocation: Option[Location] = None, sideOfStreet: Option[SideOfStreet] = None, wheelchairAccessible: Option[Accessibility] = None) extends AAccessPointPlace with Product with Serializable

    Access point to a venue/station

  144.  case class AccessPointPlacePedestrian(name: Option[String] = None, waypoint: Option[Int] = None, type: String, location: Location, originalLocation: Option[Location] = None, sideOfStreet: Option[SideOfStreet] = None, wheelchairAccessible: Option[Accessibility] = None) extends AAccessPointPlacePedestrian with Product with Serializable

    Access point to a venue/station

  145.  case class Agency(id: String, name: String, website: Option[String] = None) extends AAgency with Product with Serializable

    Contains information about a particular agency.

  146.  case class Allow(hov: Option[Boolean] = None, hot: Option[Boolean] = None) extends AAllow with Product with Serializable

    Explicitly allow features that require users to opt in.

  147.  case class ArriveAction(action: String, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None) extends AArriveAction with Product with Serializable

  148.  case class ArrivePedestrianAction(action: String, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None) extends AArrivePedestrianAction with Product with Serializable

  149.  case class Attribution(id: String, href: Option[String] = None, text: String, hrefText: Option[String] = None, type: Option[Type] = None) extends AAttribution with Product with Serializable

    The URL address to an external resource.

  150.  case class AuthErrorResponseSchema(error: Option[String] = None, errorUnderscoredescription: Option[String] = None) extends AAuthErrorResponseSchema with Product with Serializable

  151.  case class Avoid(features: Option[String] = None, areas: Option[String] = None, segments: Option[String] = None, zoneCategories: Option[String] = None, zoneIdentifiers: Option[String] = None, truckRoadTypes: Option[String] = None, tollTransponders: Option[String] = None) extends AAvoid with Product with Serializable

  152.  case class AvoidPost(segments: Option[Seq[String]] = None) extends AAvoidPost with Product with Serializable

    Avoid routes that violate certain features of road network or that go through user-specified geographical bounding boxes.

    Avoid routes that violate certain features of road network or that go through user-specified geographical bounding boxes. For the general description of the functionality please refer to the avoid parameter of the query string. Passing parameters in the POST body is suggested when the length of the parameters exceeds the limitation of the GET request.

  153.  case class AxleGroupWeight(maxWeight: Option[Int] = None, axleGroup: Option[String] = None) extends AAxleGroupWeight with Product with Serializable

    Contains the maximum allowed weight for an axle-group.

  154.  case class BaseAction(action: String, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None) extends ABaseAction with Product with Serializable

    An action to be performed between sections or during a section.

  155.  case class BaseNoticeDetail(title: Option[String] = None, cause: Option[String] = None, type: String) extends ABaseNoticeDetail with Product with Serializable

  156.  case class BasePlace(name: Option[String] = None, waypoint: Option[Int] = None, type: String, location: Location, originalLocation: Option[Location] = None, sideOfStreet: Option[SideOfStreet] = None) extends ABasePlace with Product with Serializable

  157.  case class BaseSummary(duration: Int, length: Int) extends ABaseSummary with Product with Serializable

    Total value of key attributes for a route section.

  158.  case class BoardAction(action: String, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None) extends ABoardAction with Product with Serializable

    An action to board a ferry.

  159.  case class CalculateRoutesPostParameters(avoid: Option[AvoidPost] = None, ev: Option[EVPost] = None, maxSpeedOnSegment: Option[Seq[MaxSpeedOnSegmentPost]] = None) extends ACalculateRoutesPostParameters with Product with Serializable

    Parameters of the POST body for route calculation

  160.  case class ChargingAction(action: String, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, consumablePower: Option[Double] = None, arrivalCharge: Option[Double] = None, targetCharge: Option[Double] = None) extends AChargingAction with Product with Serializable

    An action to charge the vehicle.

  161.  case class ChargingConnectorAttributes(power: Double, current: Option[Double] = None, voltage: Option[Double] = None, supplyType: String, connectorType: String) extends AChargingConnectorAttributes with Product with Serializable

    Details of the connector that is suggested to be used in the section's postAction for charging.

  162.  case class ChargingSetupAction(action: String, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None) extends AChargingSetupAction with Product with Serializable

    An action to prepare for vehicle charging.

    An action to prepare for vehicle charging. Represents the time spent setting up for charging (e.g., payment processing), independent of the time required to actually charge the vehicle.

  163.  case class ChargingStationBrand(name: Option[String] = None, hrn: Option[String] = None) extends AChargingStationBrand with Product with Serializable

    Information regarding the charging station brand

  164.  case class ChargingStationPlace(name: Option[String] = None, waypoint: Option[Int] = None, type: String, location: Location, originalLocation: Option[Location] = None, sideOfStreet: Option[SideOfStreet] = None, id: Option[String] = None, connectorAttributes: Option[ChargingConnectorAttributes] = None, brand: Option[ChargingStationBrand] = None) extends AChargingStationPlace with Product with Serializable

    A charging station

  165.  case class ChargingStationPlacePedestrian(name: Option[String] = None, waypoint: Option[Int] = None, type: String, location: Location, originalLocation: Option[Location] = None, sideOfStreet: Option[SideOfStreet] = None, id: Option[String] = None, connectorAttributes: Option[ChargingConnectorAttributes] = None, brand: Option[ChargingStationBrand] = None) extends AChargingStationPlacePedestrian with Product with Serializable

    A charging station

  166.  case class ContinueAction(action: String, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None, intersectionName: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None) extends AContinueAction with Product with Serializable

    An action to be performed at or during a specific portion of a section.

    An action to be performed at or during a specific portion of a section. * depart: departure maneuver, such as \"Start at\" * arrive: arrival maneuver, such as \"Arrive at\" * continue: continue maneuver, such as \"Continue on\"

  167.  case class ContinuePedestrianAction(action: String, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None, intersectionName: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None) extends AContinuePedestrianAction with Product with Serializable

    An action to be performed at or during a specific portion of a section.

    An action to be performed at or during a specific portion of a section. * depart: departure maneuver, such as \"Start at\" * arrive: arrival maneuver, such as \"Arrive at\" * continue: continue maneuver, such as \"Continue on\"

  168.  case class DataVersion(name: String, version: String) extends ADataVersion with Product with Serializable

    Version of a specific data set

  169.  case class DeboardAction(action: String, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None) extends ADeboardAction with Product with Serializable

    An action to disembark a ferry.

  170.  case class DefaultFarePrice() extends FarePrice with ApiModel with Product with Serializable
  171.  case class DefaultImportGeoBody() extends ImportGeoBody with ApiModel with Product with Serializable

  174.  case class DefaultPedestrianPostAction() extends PedestrianPostAction with ApiModel with Product with Serializable
  175.  case class DefaultRouterSection() extends RouterSection with ApiModel with Product with Serializable
  176.  case class DefaultTransitPostAction() extends TransitPostAction with ApiModel with Product with Serializable
  177.  case class DefaultTransitPreAction() extends TransitPreAction with ApiModel with Product with Serializable
  178.  case class DefaultVehicleAction() extends VehicleAction with ApiModel with Product with Serializable
  179.  case class DefaultVehicleNoticeDetail() extends VehicleNoticeDetail with ApiModel with Product with Serializable
  180.  case class DefaultVehiclePlace() extends VehiclePlace with ApiModel with Product with Serializable
  181.  case class DefaultVehiclePostAction() extends VehiclePostAction with ApiModel with Product with Serializable
  182.  case class DepartAction(action: String, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None) extends ADepartAction with Product with Serializable

  183.  case class DepartPedestrianAction(action: String, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None) extends ADepartPedestrianAction with Product with Serializable

  184.  case class DockingStationPlace(name: Option[String] = None, waypoint: Option[Int] = None, type: String, location: Location, originalLocation: Option[Location] = None, sideOfStreet: Option[SideOfStreet] = None) extends ADockingStationPlace with Product with Serializable

    A place represents a docking station for rented vehicles.

  185.  case class DockingStationPlacePedestrian(name: Option[String] = None, waypoint: Option[Int] = None, type: String, location: Location, originalLocation: Option[Location] = None, sideOfStreet: Option[SideOfStreet] = None) extends ADockingStationPlacePedestrian with Product with Serializable

    A place represents a docking station for rented vehicles.

  186.  case class Driver(schedule: Option[String] = None) extends ADriver with Product with Serializable

    Driver parameters to be used for calculating routes with automatically added rest stops.

  187.  case class DynamicSpeedInfo(trafficSpeed: Double, baseSpeed: Double, turnTime: Int) extends ADynamicSpeedInfo with Product with Serializable

    Describes dynamic speed information, such as traffic speed, estimated speed without traffic, and turn time.

  188.  case class EV(freeFlowSpeedTable: String, trafficSpeedTable: Option[String] = None, ascent: Option[Double] = None, descent: Option[Double] = None, auxiliaryConsumption: Option[Double] = None, initialCharge: Option[Double] = None, maxCharge: Option[Double] = None, chargingCurve: Option[String] = None, maxChargingVoltage: Option[Double] = None, maxChargingCurrent: Option[Double] = None, maxChargeAfterChargingStation: Option[Double] = None, minChargeAtChargingStation: Option[Double] = None, minChargeAtFirstChargingStation: Option[Double] = None, minChargeAtDestination: Option[Double] = None, chargingSetupDuration: Option[Int] = None, connectorTypes: Option[String] = None, makeReachable: Option[Boolean] = None, preferredBrands: Option[String] = None) extends AEV with Product with Serializable

    EV parameters to be used for calculating consumption and for calculating EV routes with automatically added charging stations.

    EV parameters to be used for calculating consumption and for calculating EV routes with automatically added charging stations. The following attributes are required for calculating consumption: * freeFlowSpeedTable The following attributes are additionally required in order to calculate reachable routes: * initialCharge * maxCharge * connectorTypes * chargingCurve * maxChargeAfterChargingStation * makeReachable set to true All remaining attributes are optional. **NOTE:** We do not support hybrid vehicles (EV + Other fuel types). Consumption parameters are not supported for combination of ev and fuel vehicles.

  189.  case class EVConsumption(freeFlowSpeedTable: String, trafficSpeedTable: Option[String] = None, ascent: Option[Double] = None, descent: Option[Double] = None, auxiliaryConsumption: Option[Double] = None, initialCharge: Option[Double] = None, maxCharge: Option[Double] = None, chargingCurve: Option[String] = None, maxChargingVoltage: Option[Double] = None, maxChargingCurrent: Option[Double] = None, maxChargeAfterChargingStation: Option[Double] = None, minChargeAtChargingStation: Option[Double] = None, minChargeAtFirstChargingStation: Option[Double] = None, minChargeAtDestination: Option[Double] = None, chargingSetupDuration: Option[Int] = None, connectorTypes: Option[String] = None) extends AEVConsumption with Product with Serializable

    EV parameters to be used for calculating consumption.

    EV parameters to be used for calculating consumption. The following attributes are required for calculating consumption: * freeFlowSpeedTable The following attributes are additionally required in order to calculate reachable routes: * initialCharge * maxCharge * connectorTypes * chargingCurve * maxChargeAfterChargingStation All remaining attributes are optional.

  190.  case class EVPost(preferredBrands: Option[Seq[String]] = None) extends AEVPost with Product with Serializable

  191.  case class ErrorResponse(title: String, status: Int, code: String, cause: String, action: String, correlationId: String) extends AErrorResponse with Product with Serializable

    Response in case of error

  192.  case class Exclude(countries: Option[String] = None) extends AExclude with Product with Serializable

    Options to exclude strictly during the route calculation.

  193.  case class ExitAction(action: String, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None, intersectionName: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None, direction: Option[Direction] = None, severity: Option[Severity] = None, turnAngle: Option[Double] = None, exit: Option[Int] = None, roundaboutAngle: Option[Double] = None) extends AExitAction with Product with Serializable

    An action to leave a roundabout or highway.

    An action to leave a roundabout or highway. * exit: exit maneuver, such as \"Take the left exit to\" * roundaboutExit: roundabout exit maneuver, such as \"Take the third exit of the roundabout onto\"

  194.  case class ExitInfo(number: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None) extends AExitInfo with Product with Serializable

    Exit information attached to an offset action

  195.  case class ExitPedestrianAction(action: String, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None, intersectionName: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None, direction: Option[Direction] = None, severity: Option[Severity] = None, turnAngle: Option[Double] = None, exit: Option[Int] = None, roundaboutAngle: Option[Double] = None) extends AExitPedestrianAction with Product with Serializable

    An action to leave a roundabout or highway.

    An action to leave a roundabout or highway. * exit: exit maneuver, such as \"Take the left exit to\" * roundaboutExit: roundabout exit maneuver, such as \"Take the third exit of the roundabout onto\"

  196.  case class Fare(id: String, name: String, price: FarePrice, convertedPrice: Option[FarePrice] = None, reason: Option[String] = None, paymentMethods: Option[Set[String]] = None, pass: Option[FarePass] = None, applicableTimes: Option[String] = None, transponders: Option[Seq[TransponderSystem]] = None) extends AFare with Product with Serializable

    Fare type contains information about a single fare or ticket needed for this section of the route.

  197.  case class FarePass(returnJourney: Option[Boolean] = None, validityPeriod: Option[FarePassValidityPeriod] = None, travels: Option[Int] = None, transfers: Option[Int] = None, seniorPass: Option[Boolean] = None) extends AFarePass with Product with Serializable

    Specifies whether this Fare is a multi-travel pass, and its characteristics

  198.  case class FarePassValidityPeriod(period: String, count: Option[Int] = None) extends AFarePassValidityPeriod with Product with Serializable

    Specifies a temporal validity period for a pass

  199.  trait FarePrice extends ApiModel
  200.  case class Fuel(type: String, freeFlowSpeedTable: String, trafficSpeedTable: Option[String] = None, additionalConsumption: Option[Double] = None, ascent: Option[Double] = None) extends AFuel with Product with Serializable

    **Disclaimer: This parameter is currently in beta release, and is therefore subject to breaking changes.** Fuel parameters to be used for calculating consumption and related CO2 emission.

    **Disclaimer: This parameter is currently in beta release, and is therefore subject to breaking changes.** Fuel parameters to be used for calculating consumption and related CO2 emission. The following attributes are required for calculating consumption: * type * freeFlowSpeedTable **NOTE:** We do not support hybrid vehicles (EV + Other fuel types). Consumption parameters are not supported for combination of ev and fuel vehicles.

  201.  case class GetRoutesByHandlePostParameters(avoid: Option[AvoidPost] = None, maxSpeedOnSegment: Option[Seq[MaxSpeedOnSegmentPost]] = None) extends AGetRoutesByHandlePostParameters with Product with Serializable

    Parameters of the POST body for get route by handle

  202.  case class HealthResponseFailSchema(status: Option[Status] = None) extends AHealthResponseFailSchema with Product with Serializable

    Returns the health of the service

  203.  case class HealthResponseOKSchema(status: Option[Status] = None) extends AHealthResponseOKSchema with Product with Serializable

    Returns the health of the service

  204.  trait ImportGeoBody extends ApiModel
  205.  case class KeepAction(action: String, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None, intersectionName: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None, direction: Option[Direction] = None, severity: Option[Severity] = None, turnAngle: Option[Double] = None) extends AKeepAction with Product with Serializable

  206.  case class KeepPedestrianAction(action: String, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None, intersectionName: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None, direction: Option[Direction] = None, severity: Option[Severity] = None, turnAngle: Option[Double] = None) extends AKeepPedestrianAction with Product with Serializable

  207.  case class LineString(type: Option[String] = None, coordinates: Seq[Seq[Double]]) extends ALineString with Product with Serializable

    GeoJSON encoding of type 'LineString'

  208.  case class LocalizedRouteNumber(value: String, language: Option[String] = None, direction: Option[Direction] = None, routeType: Option[Int] = None) extends ALocalizedRouteNumber with Product with Serializable

    Represents a route number in specific language with optional cardinal direction and route level.

  209.  case class LocalizedString(value: String, language: Option[String] = None) extends ALocalizedString with Product with Serializable

    String with optional language code.

  210.  case class Location(lat: Double, lng: Double, elv: Option[Double] = None) extends ALocation with Product with Serializable

    Location on the Earth

  211.  case class MatchTrace(trace: Seq[MatchTracePoint], via: Option[Seq[MatchTraceVia]] = None) extends AMatchTrace with Product with Serializable

    Trace file with points and path match parameters

  212.  case class MatchTracePoint(lat: Double, lng: Double) extends AMatchTracePoint with Product with Serializable

    GPS probe point with parameters relevant to path or route matching

  213.  case class MatchTraceVia(index: Int, stopDuration: Option[Int] = None) extends AMatchTraceVia with Product with Serializable

    Via waypoint in the middle of route

  214.  case class MaxSpeed() extends AMaxSpeed with Product with Serializable

    Speed in meters per second, or \"unlimited\" indicating that the speed is unlimited, e.g., on a German autobahn

  215.  case class MaxSpeedOnSegmentPost(segment: Option[String] = None, speed: Option[Double] = None) extends AMaxSpeedOnSegmentPost with Product with Serializable

    Segments with restrictions on maximum baseSpeed.

    Segments with restrictions on maximum baseSpeed. For the general description of the functionality please refer to the maxSpeedOnSegment parameter of the query string. Passing parameters in the POST body is suggested when the length of the parameters exceeds the limitation of the GET request. Example of a parameter value excluding two segments: [ { \"segment\": \"here:cm:segment:207551710#+\", \"speed\": 10 }, { \"segment\": \"here:cm:segment:76771992\", \"speed\": 1 } ] **Notes**: Maximum amount of penalized segments in one request cannot be greater than 250. A \"penalized segments\" refers to segments that have a restrictions on maximum baseSpeed with maxSpeedOnSegment or avoided with avoid[segments]

  216.  case class Notice(title: Option[String] = None, code: String, severity: Option[Severity] = None, details: Option[Seq[BaseNoticeDetail]] = None) extends ANotice with Product with Serializable

    A notice contains important notifications.

  217.  case class OffsetAction(action: String, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None) extends AOffsetAction with Product with Serializable

    An action to be performed at or during a specific portion of a section.

    An action to be performed at or during a specific portion of a section. * depart: departure maneuver, such as \"Start at\" * arrive: arrival maneuver, such as \"Arrive at\" * continue: continue maneuver, such as \"Continue on\"

  218.  case class OffsetPedestrianAction(action: String, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None) extends AOffsetPedestrianAction with Product with Serializable

    An action to be performed at or during a specific portion of a section.

    An action to be performed at or during a specific portion of a section. * depart: departure maneuver, such as \"Start at\" * arrive: arrival maneuver, such as \"Arrive at\" * continue: continue maneuver, such as \"Continue on\"

    A parking lot

  220.  case class ParkingLotPlacePedestrian(name: Option[String] = None, waypoint: Option[Int] = None, type: String, location: Location, originalLocation: Option[Location] = None, sideOfStreet: Option[SideOfStreet] = None, id: Option[String] = None, attributes: Option[Seq[String]] = None, rates: Option[Seq[TimeRestrictedPrice]] = None) extends AParkingLotPlacePedestrian with Product with Serializable

    A parking lot

  221.  case class Passthrough(place: Place, offset: Option[Double] = None) extends APassthrough with Product with Serializable

    Describes a location and time the section is passing through.

  222.  trait PedestrianAction extends ApiModel
  223.  case class PedestrianDeparture(time: Option[OffsetDateTime] = None, place: PedestrianPlace) extends APedestrianDeparture with Product with Serializable

    Departure of pedestrian

  224.  case class PedestrianNotice(title: Option[String] = None, code: String, severity: Option[Severity] = None, details: Option[Seq[BaseNoticeDetail]] = None) extends APedestrianNotice with Product with Serializable

    A notice contains important notifications.

  225.  trait PedestrianPlace extends ApiModel
  226.  trait PedestrianPostAction extends ApiModel
  227.  case class PedestrianSection(id: String, type: String, preActions: Option[Seq[BaseAction]] = None, actions: Option[Seq[PedestrianAction]] = None, language: Option[String] = None, postActions: Option[Seq[PedestrianPostAction]] = None, turnByTurnActions: Option[Seq[OffsetAction]] = None, departure: PedestrianDeparture, arrival: PedestrianDeparture, passthrough: Option[Seq[Passthrough]] = None, summary: Option[PedestrianSummary] = None, travelSummary: Option[BaseSummary] = None, polyline: Option[String] = None, notices: Option[Seq[PedestrianNotice]] = None, transport: PedestrianTransport, spans: Option[Seq[PedestrianSpan]] = None, refReplacements: Option[Map[String, String]] = None) extends APedestrianSection with Product with Serializable

    Represent a section of a route

  228.  case class PedestrianSpan(offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, duration: Option[Int] = None, streetAttributes: Option[Seq[String]] = None, walkAttributes: Option[Seq[String]] = None, carAttributes: Option[Seq[String]] = None, truckAttributes: Option[Seq[String]] = None, scooterAttributes: Option[Seq[String]] = None, names: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None, routeNumbers: Option[Seq[LocalizedRouteNumber]] = None, countryCode: Option[String] = None, stateCode: Option[String] = None, functionalClass: Option[Int] = None, speedLimit: Option[Double] = None, maxSpeed: Option[MaxSpeed] = None, dynamicSpeedInfo: Option[DynamicSpeedInfo] = None, segmentId: Option[String] = None, segmentRef: Option[String] = None, baseDuration: Option[Int] = None, typicalDuration: Option[Int] = None, incidents: Option[Seq[Int]] = None) extends APedestrianSpan with Product with Serializable

    Span attached to a Section describing pedestrian content.

  229.  case class PedestrianSummary(duration: Int, length: Int, baseDuration: Option[Int] = None) extends APedestrianSummary with Product with Serializable

    Total value of key attributes for a route section.

  230.  case class PedestrianTransport(mode: String) extends APedestrianTransport with Product with Serializable

    Information about a transport

  231.  case class Place(name: Option[String] = None, waypoint: Option[Int] = None, type: String, location: Location, originalLocation: Option[Location] = None, sideOfStreet: Option[SideOfStreet] = None) extends APlace with Product with Serializable

    A place represents a generic location relevant for the route.

  232.  case class PlacePedestrian(name: Option[String] = None, waypoint: Option[Int] = None, type: String, location: Location, originalLocation: Option[Location] = None, sideOfStreet: Option[SideOfStreet] = None) extends APlacePedestrian with Product with Serializable

    A place represents a generic location relevant for the route.

  233.  case class RampAction(action: String, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None, intersectionName: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None, direction: Option[Direction] = None, severity: Option[Severity] = None, turnAngle: Option[Double] = None) extends ARampAction with Product with Serializable

  234.  case class RampPedestrianAction(action: String, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None, intersectionName: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None, direction: Option[Direction] = None, severity: Option[Severity] = None, turnAngle: Option[Double] = None) extends ARampPedestrianAction with Product with Serializable

  235.  case class RangePrice(type: String, estimated: Option[Boolean] = None, currency: String, unit: Option[Int] = None, minimum: Double, maximum: Double) extends ARangePrice with Product with Serializable

  236.  case class Rerouting(mode: Option[Mode] = None, lastTraveledSectionIndex: Option[Int] = None, traveledDistanceOnLastSection: Option[Int] = None) extends ARerouting with Product with Serializable

    Rerouting parameters allow to request a new route calculation based on the route handle.

    Rerouting parameters allow to request a new route calculation based on the route handle. All attributes are optional.

  237.  case class RoadInfo(type: Option[Type] = None, name: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None, number: Option[Seq[LocalizedRouteNumber]] = None, toward: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None) extends ARoadInfo with Product with Serializable

    Road information attached to an offset action

  238.  case class RoundaboutEnterAction(action: String, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None, intersectionName: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None, direction: Option[Direction] = None, severity: Option[Severity] = None, turnAngle: Option[Double] = None) extends ARoundaboutEnterAction with Product with Serializable

  239.  case class RoundaboutEnterPedestrianAction(action: String, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None, intersectionName: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None, direction: Option[Direction] = None, severity: Option[Severity] = None, turnAngle: Option[Double] = None) extends ARoundaboutEnterPedestrianAction with Product with Serializable

  240.  case class RoundaboutExitAction(action: String, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None, intersectionName: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None, direction: Option[Direction] = None, severity: Option[Severity] = None, turnAngle: Option[Double] = None, exit: Option[Int] = None, roundaboutAngle: Option[Double] = None) extends ARoundaboutExitAction with Product with Serializable

  241.  case class RoundaboutExitPedestrianAction(action: String, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None, intersectionName: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None, direction: Option[Direction] = None, severity: Option[Severity] = None, turnAngle: Option[Double] = None, exit: Option[Int] = None, roundaboutAngle: Option[Double] = None) extends ARoundaboutExitPedestrianAction with Product with Serializable

    Designated name of the road (e.g.

    Designated name of the road (e.g. a street name or a transport name)

  248.  case class RouterRoute(id: String, notices: Option[Seq[Notice]] = None, sections: Seq[RouterSection], routeLabels: Option[Seq[RouteLabel]] = None, routeHandle: Option[String] = None) extends ARouterRoute with Product with Serializable

    A basic route.

    A basic route. Includes personal vehicles as car, truck, etc... For all modes, cf. transportMode.

    Returns a list of routes.

    Route number on a signpost label.

    Route number on a signpost label. The routeType property of the LocalizedRouteNumber is always null at the moment for SignpostLabel, because the data is currently not available.

  259.  case class SinglePrice(type: String, estimated: Option[Boolean] = None, currency: String, unit: Option[Int] = None, value: Double) extends ASinglePrice with Product with Serializable

  260.  case class StationPlace(name: Option[String] = None, waypoint: Option[Int] = None, type: String, location: Location, originalLocation: Option[Location] = None, sideOfStreet: Option[SideOfStreet] = None, id: Option[String] = None, platform: Option[String] = None, code: Option[String] = None, wheelchairAccessible: Option[Accessibility] = None) extends AStationPlace with Product with Serializable

    Taxi-specific parameters

  263.  case class TimeRestrictedPrice(type: String, estimated: Option[Boolean] = None, currency: String, unit: Option[Int] = None, value: Double, days: Option[Seq[Weekdays]] = None, minDuration: Option[Int] = None, maxDuration: Option[Int] = None, fromTime: Option[String] = None, toTime: Option[String] = None) extends ATimeRestrictedPrice with Product with Serializable

  264.  case class TollCollectionLocation(name: Option[String] = None, location: Location) extends ATollCollectionLocation with Product with Serializable

    Refers to the physical location where the toll is collected.

    Refers to the physical location where the toll is collected. This can include various structures such as toll booths, transponder readers, or number-plate cameras. It's important to note that certain toll collection methods, such as vignettes, do not have specific toll collection locations associated with them, and therefore this element will not be present at all. The value of this property is a Location that specifies the coordinates of the payment location.

  265.  case class TollCost(tollSystem: String, tollSystemRef: Int, countryCode: Option[String] = None, tollCollectionLocations: Option[Seq[TollCollectionLocation]] = None, fares: Seq[Fare]) extends ATollCost with Product with Serializable

    Information for a single toll payment.

  266.  case class TollCountrySummary(countryCode: Option[String] = None, price: Option[FarePrice] = None) extends ATollCountrySummary with Product with Serializable

  267.  case class TollSummary(total: Option[FarePrice] = None, totalBySystem: Option[Seq[TollSystemSummary]] = None, totalByCountry: Option[Seq[TollCountrySummary]] = None) extends ATollSummary with Product with Serializable

    The summary of the tolls grouped by criteria (total, per system, per country).

  268.  case class TollSystem(name: Option[String] = None, id: Option[String] = None) extends ATollSystem with Product with Serializable

    Information about a toll system collecting payments on the route.

  269.  case class TollSystemSummary(tollSystem: Option[Int] = None, price: Option[FarePrice] = None) extends ATollSystemSummary with Product with Serializable

  270.  case class Tolls(transponders: Option[String] = None, vignettes: Option[String] = None, summaries: Option[Seq[String]] = None, vehicleCategory: Option[String] = None, emissionType: Option[String] = None) extends ATolls with Product with Serializable

    Vehicle-independent options that may affect route toll calculation as well as options affecting the output of the tolls, such as summaries.

    Vehicle-independent options that may affect route toll calculation as well as options affecting the output of the tolls, such as summaries. Since this parameter controls behaviour related to tolls in the return part of the response, use of this parameter requires return=tolls to be selected.

  271.  case class Traffic(overrideFlowDuration: Option[Int] = None, mode: Option[Mode] = None) extends ATraffic with Product with Serializable

    Traffic specific parameters.

  272.  case class TrafficIncident(description: Option[String] = None, type: Option[String] = None, criticality: Option[Criticality] = None, validFrom: Option[OffsetDateTime] = None, validUntil: Option[OffsetDateTime] = None, id: Option[String] = None) extends ATrafficIncident with Product with Serializable

    An incident describes a temporary event on the road network.

    An incident describes a temporary event on the road network. It typically refers to a real world incident (accident, road construction, weather condition, etc.) on a street or street segment

  273.  case class TrailerCountRange(from: Option[Int] = None, to: Option[Int] = None) extends ATrailerCountRange with Product with Serializable

    Constrains the restriction to vehicles with the number of trailers within the specified range.

  274.  case class TransitDeparture(time: Option[OffsetDateTime] = None, place: StationPlace, delay: Option[Int] = None, status: Option[String] = None) extends ATransitDeparture with Product with Serializable

    Transit departure

  275.  case class TransitIncident(summary: Option[String] = None, description: Option[String] = None, type: String, effect: String, validFrom: Option[OffsetDateTime] = None, validUntil: Option[OffsetDateTime] = None, url: Option[String] = None) extends ATransitIncident with Product with Serializable

    An incident describes disruptions on the transit network.

    An incident describes disruptions on the transit network. Disruptions scale from delays to service cancellations.

  276.  case class TransitNotice(title: Option[String] = None, code: String, severity: Option[Severity] = None, details: Option[Seq[BaseNoticeDetail]] = None) extends ATransitNotice with Product with Serializable

    A notice contains important notifications.

  277.  trait TransitPostAction extends ApiModel
  278.  trait TransitPreAction extends ApiModel
  279.  case class TransitSection(id: String, type: String, preActions: Option[Seq[TransitPreAction]] = None, actions: Option[Seq[OffsetAction]] = None, language: Option[String] = None, postActions: Option[Seq[TransitPostAction]] = None, turnByTurnActions: Option[Seq[OffsetAction]] = None, departure: TransitDeparture, arrival: TransitDeparture, passthrough: Option[Seq[Passthrough]] = None, summary: Option[BaseSummary] = None, travelSummary: Option[BaseSummary] = None, polyline: Option[String] = None, notices: Option[Seq[TransitNotice]] = None, bookingLinks: Option[Seq[WebLinkWithDeviceType]] = None, transport: Option[TransitTransport] = None, intermediateStops: Option[Seq[TransitStop]] = None, agency: Option[Agency] = None, attributions: Option[Seq[Attribution]] = None, fares: Option[Seq[Fare]] = None, booking: Option[WebLink] = None, spans: Option[Seq[TransitSpan]] = None, incidents: Option[Seq[TransitIncident]] = None) extends ATransitSection with Product with Serializable

    A section of the route.

    A section of the route. It contains departure, arrival, and route information.

  280.  case class TransitSpan(offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, duration: Option[Int] = None, countryCode: Option[String] = None, stateCode: Option[String] = None, names: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None, segmentId: Option[String] = None, segmentRef: Option[String] = None, refReplacements: Option[Map[String, String]] = None) extends ATransitSpan with Product with Serializable

    Contains information attached to a contiguous part of a Section.

    Contains information attached to a contiguous part of a Section. The information may be attached along different dimensions of a section which are geometry (spatial), distance or time. A section, if it uses spans, has an optional attribute spans which is an array of extended Span types. The attributes of a span which should be returned in the response are configured by a request parameter. Use this type as a base for any span extension for sections that provide spans.

  281.  case class TransitStop(departure: TransitDeparture, duration: Option[Int] = None, attributes: Option[Seq[String]] = None) extends ATransitStop with Product with Serializable

    A transit stop of the route

  282.  case class TransitTransport(mode: String, name: Option[String] = None, headsign: Option[String] = None, category: Option[String] = None, color: Option[String] = None, textColor: Option[String] = None, shortName: Option[String] = None, longName: Option[String] = None) extends ATransitTransport with Product with Serializable

    Transit transport information.

  283.  case class TransponderSystem(system: Option[String] = None) extends ATransponderSystem with Product with Serializable

    Transponder system for which a fare is applicable.

  284.  case class Truck(shippedHazardousGoods: Option[String] = None, grossWeight: Option[Int] = None, weightPerAxle: Option[Int] = None, weightPerAxleGroup: Option[String] = None, height: Option[Int] = None, width: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, kpraLength: Option[Int] = None, payloadCapacity: Option[Int] = None, tunnelCategory: Option[Value] = None, axleCount: Option[Int] = None, trailerAxleCount: Option[Int] = None, tiresCount: Option[Int] = None, category: Option[Category] = None, trailerCount: Option[Int] = None, hovOccupancy: Option[Int] = None, licensePlate: Option[String] = None, speedCap: Option[Double] = None, engineSizeCc: Option[Int] = None, occupancy: Option[Int] = None, type: Option[Default] = None) extends ATruck with Product with Serializable

    Vehicle-specific parameters

  285.  case class TruckAxleCountRange(from: Option[Int] = None, to: Option[Int] = None) extends ATruckAxleCountRange with Product with Serializable

    Constrains the restriction to trucks with the number of axles within the specified range.

  286.  case class TurnAction(action: String, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None, intersectionName: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None, direction: Option[Direction] = None, severity: Option[Severity] = None, turnAngle: Option[Double] = None) extends ATurnAction with Product with Serializable

    An action in which a direction change is made.

    An action in which a direction change is made. * ramp: ramp maneuver, such as \"Take the left ramp onto\" * roundaboutPass: Going straight on a roundabout maneuver * roundaboutEnter: Arriving at a destination roundabout maneuver * uTurn: u-turn maneuver, such as \"Make a right U-turn at\" * turn: turn maneuver, such as \"Make a sharp right turn at\" * keep: a maneuver following a fork, such as \"Take the middle fork onto\" * enterHighway: a maneuver to enter a highway, used for turn-by-turn guidance only

  287.  case class TurnPedestrianAction(action: String, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None, intersectionName: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None, direction: Option[Direction] = None, severity: Option[Severity] = None, turnAngle: Option[Double] = None) extends ATurnPedestrianAction with Product with Serializable

    An action in which a direction change is made.

    An action in which a direction change is made. * ramp: ramp maneuver, such as \"Take the left ramp onto\" * roundaboutPass: Going straight on a roundabout maneuver * roundaboutEnter: Arriving at a destination roundabout maneuver * uTurn: u-turn maneuver, such as \"Make a right U-turn at\" * turn: turn maneuver, such as \"Make a sharp right turn at\" * keep: a maneuver following a fork, such as \"Take the middle fork onto\" * enterHighway: a maneuver to enter a highway, used for turn-by-turn guidance only

  288.  case class UTurnAction(action: String, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None, intersectionName: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None, direction: Option[Direction] = None, severity: Option[Severity] = None, turnAngle: Option[Double] = None) extends AUTurnAction with Product with Serializable

  289.  case class UTurnPedestrianAction(action: String, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None, intersectionName: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None, direction: Option[Direction] = None, severity: Option[Severity] = None, turnAngle: Option[Double] = None) extends AUTurnPedestrianAction with Product with Serializable

  297.  case class VehicleRestriction(title: Option[String] = None, cause: Option[String] = None, type: String, forbiddenHazardousGoods: Option[Seq[String]] = None, maxGrossWeight: Option[Int] = None, maxWeightPerAxle: Option[Int] = None, maxAxleGroupWeight: Option[AxleGroupWeight] = None, maxHeight: Option[Int] = None, maxWidth: Option[Int] = None, maxLength: Option[Int] = None, axleCount: Option[TruckAxleCountRange] = None, tunnelCategory: Option[Value] = None, timeDependent: Option[Boolean] = None, truckType: Option[Type] = None, vehicleType: Option[Type] = None, trailerCount: Option[TrailerCountRange] = None, maxEngineSize: Option[Int] = None, minEngineSize: Option[Int] = None, maxOccupancy: Option[Int] = None, minOccupancy: Option[Int] = None, restrictedTimes: Option[String] = None, maxKpraLength: Option[Int] = None, maxPayloadCapacity: Option[Int] = None) extends AVehicleRestriction with Product with Serializable

    Contains details about violated restrictions.

    Contains details about violated restrictions. Certain properties represent conditions to be evaluated, e.g., according to vehicle properties. The restriction is violated only if all of the conditions present are met.

  298.  case class VehicleSection(id: String, type: String, preActions: Option[Seq[BaseAction]] = None, actions: Option[Seq[VehicleAction]] = None, language: Option[String] = None, postActions: Option[Seq[VehiclePostAction]] = None, turnByTurnActions: Option[Seq[VehicleAction]] = None, departure: VehicleDeparture, arrival: VehicleDeparture, passthrough: Option[Seq[Passthrough]] = None, summary: Option[VehicleSummary] = None, travelSummary: Option[VehicleTravelSummary] = None, polyline: Option[String] = None, notices: Option[Seq[VehicleNotice]] = None, spans: Option[Seq[VehicleSpan]] = None, routingZones: Option[Seq[RoutingZone]] = None, truckRoadTypes: Option[Seq[String]] = None, incidents: Option[Seq[TrafficIncident]] = None, refReplacements: Option[Map[String, String]] = None, tollSystems: Option[Seq[TollSystem]] = None, tolls: Option[Seq[TollCost]] = None, consumptionType: Option[String] = None, transport: VehicleTransport) extends AVehicleSection with Product with Serializable

    Represent a section of a route

  299.  case class VehicleSpan(offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, duration: Option[Int] = None, streetAttributes: Option[Seq[String]] = None, walkAttributes: Option[Seq[String]] = None, carAttributes: Option[Seq[String]] = None, truckAttributes: Option[Seq[String]] = None, scooterAttributes: Option[Seq[String]] = None, tollSystems: Option[Seq[Int]] = None, names: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None, routeNumbers: Option[Seq[LocalizedRouteNumber]] = None, countryCode: Option[String] = None, stateCode: Option[String] = None, functionalClass: Option[Int] = None, speedLimit: Option[Double] = None, maxSpeed: Option[MaxSpeed] = None, dynamicSpeedInfo: Option[DynamicSpeedInfo] = None, segmentId: Option[String] = None, segmentRef: Option[String] = None, consumption: Option[Double] = None, baseDuration: Option[Int] = None, typicalDuration: Option[Int] = None, incidents: Option[Seq[Int]] = None, routingZones: Option[Seq[Int]] = None, truckRoadTypes: Option[Seq[Int]] = None, gate: Option[String] = None, railwayCrossing: Option[String] = None, notices: Option[Seq[Int]] = None) extends AVehicleSpan with Product with Serializable

    Span attached to a Section that describes the vehicle content.

  300.  case class VehicleSummary(duration: Int, length: Int, consumption: Option[Double] = None, baseDuration: Option[Int] = None, typicalDuration: Option[Int] = None, tolls: Option[TollSummary] = None, co2Emission: Option[Double] = None) extends AVehicleSummary with Product with Serializable
